blue_oceans.notes: 28.5M community (r/personalfinance 19M, r/investing 2.9M, r/stocks 5.2M filtered, r/wallstreetbets behavioral overlap). Loss aversion, FOMO, recency bias, sunk cost fallacy, overconfidence, anchoring, mental accounting — these biases destroy retail portfolio returns by 1.5-2% annually (DALBAR). Gap: one behavioral finance science concept per day (loss aversion: why losses feel 2.5x worse than equivalent gains, how FOMO drives buy-high-sell-low, why disposition effect makes investors sell winners and hold losers, hot-hand fallacy in market context, mental accounting in consumption) with streak XP, bias-immunity mastery badges (Loss Aversion Immunized, FOMO-Proof Investor, Sunk Cost Cutter), progression from emotionally-reactive to rational long-term investor. Duolingo for investor psychology. Nothing like this exists.

blue_oceans.niche: Daily Compound Interest and Wealth Math Streak
blue_oceans.notes: 22M community (r/personalfinance 19M core, r/financialindependence 1.7M, r/Bogleheads 640K). Rule of 72, compound interest science, inflation as wealth destruction, tax-drag and fee-drag calculations (0.8% fee over 30 years destroys 22% of terminal wealth). Gap: one wealth math concept per day (Rule of 72 and choosing between 6% vs 7% returns, how 1% management fee costs $150K on a $100K investment over 30 years, inflation-adjusted vs nominal returns, sequence-of-returns risk in early retirement, dollar-cost averaging effect on cost basis). Badges: Compound Interest Master, Fee-Destroyer, Inflation-Beater. The Psychology of Money 4M copies at $18 proves the ICP.

19.5M community (r/personalfinance 19M, r/povertyfinance 2.1M filtered, r/ynab 330K). YNAB 500K subscribers at $99/yr = $49.5M ARR proves massive willingness to pay for budgeting methodology. YNAB teaches system via tools, not daily science micro-lessons. Gap: zero-based budgeting science, savings rate formula (income gap not income level), envelope budgeting psychological mechanism (pain of paying), Parkinson's Law in spending, wealth gap between high-income low-savers vs. moderate-income high-savers. Badges: Zero-Based Budgeter, Savings Rate Optimizer, Envelope Master, Anti-Parkinson Practitioner. 19.5M is the largest single-audience niche this scraper has found in 101 cycles.

8.7M community (r/investing 2.9M, r/stocks 5.2M filtered educational, r/ValueInvesting 420K, r/SecurityAnalysis 220K). P/E vs. PEG, EBITDA mechanics, earnings manipulation spotting, free cash flow yield vs. earnings yield. Gap: daily stock market science (P/E ratio and why high P/E is not automatically bad, reading cash flow statement vs. income statement, ROIC as Buffett's primary metric, intrinsic value via DCF, why EPS is manipulable but FCF is not). Badges: Financial Statement Reader, DCF Calculator, Moat Identifier, Margin of Safety Expert. Investopedia is static reference; nothing is gamified daily mobile streak.

blue_oceans.niche: Daily Crypto and Blockchain Science Streak
blue_oceans.notes: 8.5M community (r/CryptoCurrency 6.8M, r/ethereum 1.9M filtered technical, r/Bitcoin technical 12% of 6.9M). Proof-of-stake vs proof-of-work (99.95% energy difference), smart contracts and EVM, tokenomics and vesting schedules, AMMs and impermanent loss, L1/L2/sidechain security tradeoffs. Binance Academy is static reference. CoinMarketCap is price tracker. Zero gamified daily blockchain science streak. Badges: Consensus Expert, DeFi Navigator, Tokenomics Analyst, On-Chain Analyst. Massive community, massive education gap.

5.2M community (r/personalfinance psychology-focused 27% = 5.1M, r/financialindependence 1.7M psychology overlap). The Psychology of Money sold 4M copies at $18 = $72M — proves the ICP wants wealth psychology content daily. APA: 72% of Americans report money stress. Gap: money scripts and childhood money messages, lifestyle inflation and hedonic adaptation, loss aversion in consumption decisions, productive vs. destructive mental accounting, net worth comparison trap. Badges: Money Script Auditor, Lifestyle Inflation Immunizer, Hedonic Adaptation Master, Delayed Gratifier. Zero daily mobile streak app for wealth psychology science.

4.8M community (r/tax 385K, r/personalfinance 25% tax-focused = 4.75M, investing tax-loss harvesting). Average American overpays taxes $1,000+/year from not knowing tax-advantaged accounts. Gap: deduction vs. credit science, 401(k) vs. Roth decision framework, tax-loss harvesting without wash-sale violations, HSA triple-tax-advantage mechanics, backdoor Roth IRA mechanics. Badges: 401k Maxer, Tax-Loss Harvest Expert, HSA Optimizer, Roth Converter. TurboTax/TaxAct are filing tools not education. ICP collectively loses $200B+ annually to unnecessary taxes.

3.4M community (r/economics 1.05M, r/MacroEconomics 220K, r/finance 1.3M, investing macro overlap 830K). Yield curve inversion predicting every US recession since 1955, CPI vs. PCE and why Fed targets PCE, ISM PMI leading vs. lagging indicator, real federal funds rate and equity valuations via discount rate, M2 money supply 12-18 month inflation lag. Gap: daily macro science for retail investors who want to understand Fed policy context for their portfolio. Badges: Yield Curve Reader, Fed Watcher, Leading Indicator Analyst, Macro-Cycle Aware Investor. Bloomberg/WSJ are news; FRED is raw data; nothing gamified.

2.3M community (r/financialindependence 1.7M, r/leanfire 240K, r/fatFIRE 340K, r/ChubbyFIRE 120K). 4% safe withdrawal rate and Trinity Study, savings rate as primary FIRE determinant, coast FIRE vs barista FIRE vs lean FIRE vs fat FIRE math, sequence-of-returns risk in first 5 years of retirement, 25x rule as most powerful personal finance formula. cFIREsim and FIREcalc are calculators not mobile apps. Zero daily FIRE math science streak. Badges: Savings Rate Optimizer, Coast FIRE Achiever, SWR Calibrated, FI Number Locked. ICP: 25-45yo professionals who discovered FIRE and want deep math daily.

2.2M community (r/Bogleheads 640K, r/Vanguard 560K, r/personalfinance three-fund focused 1M filtered). 90% of active managers underperform 15+ year benchmark, survivorship bias in fund selection, TER math (1.0% vs 0.03% compounded), three-fund portfolio global allocation, annual vs threshold-based rebalancing science, market-cap weighted indexes self-cleaning mechanism, factor tilts. Bogleheads.org is a forum not mobile. Zero daily gamified index fund science streak. Badges: Survivorship Bias Immune, Low-Cost Optimizer, Three-Fund Architect, Evidence-Based Investor.

1.8M community (r/realestateinvesting 600K, r/landlord 310K, r/airbnb 280K, r/REBubble 390K filtered investors, r/BRRRR 220K). Cap rate mechanics, cash-on-cash return vs. cap rate difference, DSCR and lender approval thresholds, 1% rule as screening not decision tool, 1031 exchange capital gains deferral mechanics, BRRRR method. BiggerPockets is forum/podcast not daily streak. Roofstock is marketplace. Zero daily real estate science streak. Badges: Cap Rate Calculator, Cash Flow Analyst, 1031 Executor, BRRRR Operator. High-value ICP (aspiring landlords) willing to pay premium.

1.5M community (r/options 1.1M, r/thetagang 280K, r/Optionsmillionaires 110K). Delta misunderstanding (0.30 delta not 30% ITM probability), theta decay acceleration in final 21 days, IV rank vs. percentile for options pricing, gamma risk near expiration, iron condor mechanics and market conditions. tastytrade is YouTube/platform not mobile streak. Option Strat is visualization tool not education. Zero daily gamified options science streak. Badges: Greeks Fluent, IV Rank Master, Theta Harvester, Risk-Defined Trader. r/thetagang 280K people actively learning this — high-intent ICP.

900K community (r/dividends 530K, r/dividendinvesting 180K, r/passiveincome dividend-focused 190K). Yield on cost compounding over 20 years, free cash flow payout ratio vs earnings payout ratio, dividend growth rate science, dividend aristocrats qualification criteria, sector rotation and dividend safety in recessions. Simply Safe Dividends is a data tool not education. Seeking Alpha is analysis content. Zero daily gamified dividend science streak. Badges: Yield-on-Cost Tracker, Payout Analyst, Aristocrat Screener, Income Architect.
